programme.title: 2026 Proof Silver Eagle: America's 250th Anniversary Release
programme.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a historic release - the first-ever 1776-2026 dual-date Proof Silver Eagle with Liberty Bell privy mark, struck in .999 silver for America's 250th Anniversary. A one-year-only issue collectors won't want to miss.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: The auction heads to Irving, Texas; Lesa and Moe go toe-to-toe for a unit with a mystical item; Victor flips a small locker for twenty-five times his initial investment; and Ricky and Bubba hit pay dirt with a locker containing sci-fi memorabilia.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: The Doc and the Junkster get desperate on the final day in Austin; Moe and Mary bid on a locker full of pinatas; Jenny seeks furniture, but obtains a new set of wheels instead.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers battle in Rancho Cucamonga, Calif.; Dave Hester arrives in a truck large enough to fit his ego; Jarrod and Brandi obtain a vintage mask; Barry Weiss scores with a rock 'n' roll legend.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy changes his game and pursues a locker with collectibles; Mary looks for quick-sale items; Darrell calls upon a friend for assistance when he is tested by local Mission Hills buyers.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers are in Upland, Calif.; Barry brings an advantage; Darrell gets shut out; Jarrod and Brandi fall in love with a furniture locker; Dave goes all out on a jewelry unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers gamble on storage units in Las Vegas; Darrell bets on a locker covered with blankets; Barry appraises a sign from the 1940s and makes a new friend.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers descend upon Riverside, Calif., where Mary hopes to dial up some luck and Brandi tries to stay positive for Jarrod.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dan and Laura face tough competition in the neighborhood of North Hollywood; Dave's locker may be a hit; Mary eyes two units that, if purchased together, would make a perfect fit.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Louisiana police chase down a vehicle after they nearly get struck in a collision; K9 patrol in Marion County Florida enlists an air unit to help them and their dogs track down suspected burglars on the run.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A Richland County, S.C., vehicle pursuit ends in a rollover crash, as a deputy manages to subdue the suspect and save a baby at the same time; officers in El Paso, Texas find someone they know in the back seat of a car; a man in Walton County, Fla., shares his views with officers about the President, his hatred of domestic violence, and how he once got a trespassing charge at a gas station.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a traffic stop uncovers dangerous goods; in Tallahassee, officers investigate a suspected shooting at an apartment complex; in Pomona, a traffic stop leads to a dramatic foot chase.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Nye County, officers respond to a traffic accident and find a woman trapped in her car with cats; in Terre Haute, a woman is found passed out at a drive-thru; and in Indiana, a self-proclaimed "traveling man" defends his right to travel.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Mission, Texas, a house fire leads to a K9 rescue; in Jefferson, a driver takes officers on a dramatic chase; in Nye County, officers are called to wrangle wild horses.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers respond to a suspected report of guns drawn in Tulsa; in Salinas, a traffic stop and K9 search uncovers alleged cocaine; and in Missoula, it's medieval times.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Indiana, a pursuit and manhunt unfold as a fleeing driver nearly crashes several times; in Tulsa, a man in nothing but his boxers draws attention on a busy median; in Lawrence, officers encounter a caped crusader in a less-than-heroic predicament.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Greene County, police pursue a group of motorcyclists suspected of evading capture; in Salinas, a van reportedly containing stolen jewelry makes its way home; in Indiana, a vehicle search takes a turn when a woman struggles with a spicy chicken nugget.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Warwick, officers respond to a colleague's home after a wild bird gets loose inside; in Greene County, a driver flees a traffic stop; in Pasco, a K9 team searches for a suspect.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Richland, police conduct night-vision surveillance on a suspected drug house; in Salinas, a reckless RV reportedly strikes a fire hydrant before fleeing the scene; in Tulsa, officers investigate reports of an alleged armed robbery.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A man in Florida armed with a sword claims self-defense; in Warwick, officers deal with an unusual bar patron.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A modified muscle car in Greene County raises suspicion; in Richland, officers investigate reports of shots fired; a Pasco County deputy and K9 join as special guests.

programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife in their pool. However, the man claims he has no explanation and no recollection of the crime.

programme.desc: A man's demeanour in court leads the Judge to rule that she wouldn't let him drive a tricycle let alone a car which he is accused of wrecking.
